seoTitle: Ashbury vs Ashby Heights — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Ashbury and Ashby Heights. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Ashbury vs Ashby Heights: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Ashbury and Ashby Heights.
heading: Ashbury vs Ashby Heights — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Ashbury, New South Wales and Ashby Heights, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Ashby Heights has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Ashbury (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Ashbury or Ashby Heights safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Ashbury has a flood risk score of 44/100, while Ashby Heights scores 49/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Ashbury scores 24/100 for bushfire risk. Ashby Heights scores 34/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Ashbury or Ashby Heights?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Ashby Heights has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.7% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
